reason: Pre-commit checklist — lint, typecheck, no any, no console.log
TypeScript type mirroring rules — snake_case API keys, no any
JWT auth: withAuth HOC, token storage, 401 handling
Backend quality: Pydantic schemas, error handling, auth middleware
Cross-stack code quality: Python ruff + TypeScript eslint rules
Cross-layer review: data format at each boundary, auth context, WebSocket messages
